sme_leads.notes: Long-established barbershop at 293 Shirley Rd with only a Facebook page and third-party directory listings — no owned website, invisible to Google search beyond directories.
Popular barber on Shirley High Street with 294+ reviews on Birdeye but no dedicated website — only Facebook and Fresha, so organic search traffic is being left on the table.
Family-run traditional cafe operating since 1989 with only a Facebook page despite a strong local reputation — a simple brochure site with a menu would immediately lift Google discoverability.
Established barber at 22 Portsmouth Rd relying solely on Booksy/Fresha and Facebook — a branded site with online booking would reduce dependency on third-party platforms.
5-star rated plumbing and building firm on Yell with a Facebook page but no owned website — a trades site with Google Business integration would drive direct quote enquiries.

dts.title: DVSA Wait Times Are Insane Right Now — Here's How to Get Your Test Sooner
dts.hook: Flash current DVSA wait times by region on screen, then pivot to showing how DTS finds cancelled slots in real time — ends with a CTA to drivingtestswap.uk.

dts.title: I Got My Driving Test 6 Weeks Early Using This One Trick
dts.hook: Tell the story from a learner's perspective — the frustration of a late test date, discovering the swap, booking earlier — walk viewers through the DTS flow step by step.

athletics.title: Zero to L-Sit in 30 Days
athletics.hook: Film Day 1 attempt (legs shaking, can't hold), then weekly 15-30 sec clips showing progression — raw and honest format performs well in calisthenics communities.

athletics.title: Standing Start vs. Walk-Up Sprint — Which Builds More Speed?
athletics.hook: Side-by-side on the track: two runs, slow-motion breakdown of start mechanics and acceleration phase — give a verdict with a tip at the end for sprint beginners.

aimybiz.title: I Roleplay Sales Calls With AI — Here's What I Learned
aimybiz.hook: Show a 60-second CloseCoach session on screen: AI plays a difficult prospect, Dowayne handles objections live — end with 3 lessons learned, tag sales managers in the comments CTA.

aimybiz.title: Your Reps Are Losing Deals They Should Win
aimybiz.hook: Slide 1: stat on why deals are lost (objection handling). Slides 2-4: 3 most common mistakes reps make. Slide 5-6: how CloseCoach AI coaching addresses each. Slide 7: book a demo CTA.
